Donor Privacy

Donor Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 2026

Our Commitment to Donors

E5 Enclave Incorporated respects donor privacy. We don't sell data. We don't rent lists. We don't share your information with third parties — except as required by law.

What We Collect

When you donate, we collect: name, email address, payment information (processed by PCI-compliant Stripe), and donation amount. For tax receipts, we collect your mailing address. Optionally: your permission to publish your name in our annual report.

How We Use Your Information

Your information is used solely to: process donations, send tax receipts, send newsletters (only if you opt in), and comply with IRS reporting requirements.

Public Disclosure

E5 is required to report certain donor information to the IRS on Form 990. Large donors may have their names publicly listed. You may request at any time that your name not appear in public reports. Contact accounts@e5enclave.com.

Your Rights

You may: (1) request a copy of your donor record, (2) request correction of inaccurate information, (3) request deletion of your personal data (except where retention is required by law), (4) opt out of all communications at any time.

Payment Security

Payment data is processed by Stripe (PCI-DSS Level 1 compliant). E5 never stores credit card numbers on our servers.

Contact

Questions about donor privacy: accounts@e5enclave.com. We respond within 5 business days.

E5 Enclave

Sovereign institutional infrastructure.
Founded 2024. Liberty City, Miami.
